new_classes.label_en: Grape must in fermentation or with fermentation arrested otherwise than by addition of alcohol (subheading 2204 30 10)
new_classes.label_de: Traubenmost, teilweise gegoren, auch ohne Alkohol stummgemacht (Unterposition 2204 30 10)
new_classes.definition_en: Grape must that is either currently undergoing alcoholic fermentation or whose fermentation has been arrested by means other than the addition of alcohol (e.g. by chilling, SO₂, filtration or other physical/chemical means), classified under CN subheading 2204 30 10.

new_classes.label_en: Fermentation-arrested-without-alcohol quality (fermentation stopped by means other than addition of alcohol)
new_classes.label_de: Eigenschaft 'ohne Alkohol stummgemacht' (Gärung durch andere Mittel als Alkohol gestoppt)
new_classes.definition_en: A quality borne by a grape must whose alcoholic fermentation has been arrested by physical or chemical means other than the addition of ethyl alcohol, distinguishing it from grape must whose fermentation is stopped by fortification with alcohol.

new_classes.label_en: Active fermentation quality (grape must currently undergoing alcoholic fermentation)
new_classes.label_de: Eigenschaft 'in Gärung befindlich' (Traubenmost, der aktiv vergärt)
new_classes.definition_en: A quality borne by a grape must that is currently undergoing alcoholic fermentation, i.e. the conversion of sugars into alcohol and carbon dioxide by yeast is still ongoing at the time of customs presentation.

coverage_explanation: The core product-discriminating criteria from the legal text are captured: (1) the product is grape must (subClassOf GrapeMust2204); (2) it is either in active fermentation (ActiveFermentationQuality) or has had fermentation arrested by means other than alcohol addition (FermentationArrestedWithoutAlcoholQuality); (3) it is explicitly distinguished from fortification with alcohol (complement restriction). Coverage is reduced to 0.75 because the legal text cross-references additional notes 2(a), 2(b), 2(c) and 3 to Chapter 22, which define specific thresholds for actual alcoholic strength and total dry extract used to delimit this subheading from 2204 30 96 (grape must with fermentation arrested by alcohol). These threshold values (e.g. actual alcoholic strength limits) are mentioned only by cross-reference and no specific numeric values are provided in the given legal note text, so they cannot be axiomatised here without risk of error. The sibling subheading 2204 30 96 (fermentation arrested by addition of alcohol) is implicitly excluded via the complement restriction on FortifiedWine2204 but is not yet represented as its own class in the TBox, so full disjointness modelling between the two 2204 30 subheadings awaits that class.
